Burynai Hide Boots  
 


Slot: FEET
AC: 5
STR: +2 WIS: +2
WT: 3.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL except DWF HFL GNM
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: FEET
AC: 5
STR: +2 WIS: +2
WT: 3.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL except DWF HFL GNM
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Leather
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No

Tribute:82

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 02:36:09
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 183pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 15
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kurn's Tower
NPC Name
lesser icebone skeleton


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kurn's Tower

#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 30 2002 at 6:41 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) OMFG people are actuallt tring to camp these thing they a common @$$ loot off exp mob that spawn off the wall i know i got 3 char ro 20 soloing ice and charbone in there heck on rallos only rare thing in there is the monk fingers and the ibc lol if you want some bunay marinaded crap get a lvl 13 and get a group of 3-5 and you will be owniong and in about 3 hour you will havew 2 boots 1 reforced rhino hide bp and leg maybe bargy loot 60pp worth of fs crap or more maybe so targ sheilds or no drop picers for pets maby som monk finger possible shiny brass shield if that even drops and hey if you luckly jester wont be camped and shiiii at lvl 11-15 with a group of 5 you own that rats @$$and if you win the roll well there 800pp or a sweet way to get 1hb up freind lent me his so i could get my 1hb up and that lil extra str help for every 12str you get 1 extr point of damge added to what you hit for Or if you lucky you will find a uber 55 gteing iskar faction up with bone chip for the heck offf it just ask him or hwer nicely if you can have the pathetic but ok for lvl 9-15 gear that drops that how i started out as a newb check me ot now have a 3 char to twenty heck master at selling and buying stuff geez heck if you be nice enough you can end up with a free tarmok like i did still wish i cou;ld thought that guy for give ing it to me again it was so nice of him any way the arn't rare unless your stupid and let all the esc see you on the way down usally there will be like som 125 shmy 11 ler or maby just som sks or warr killing the dang esc to get down there and if not welll hey esc are blind heck i walk right past now its just when you come from there side.. then they agro but if you stay there without being stupid they will pop up like rear and you will be drop ing them every where he it hapened to me... oh crap i got a long post oooooops sorry... oh also when you do get sick off em like i did give it to a stupid lvl oone newb they go crazy cust 14 ac is best they seeneeek i got get off this post damit.. soorrry

# Feb 24 2002 at 10:00 PM Rating: Default

15 posts
This is too much work. died 3 times just trying to get to the jester area to get to where the Lesser Icebone were. spent 3 days down there total of 15 hours. not one Burynai boot. think I will just wait and try for the Crystal lined slippers for my druid when he get to his mid 30's. Man way to hard... really.. too time consuming.. I mean I dont mind doing the time but with no reward.. naw not worth it.. hehe.. cya

Lesser icebones show up all over the area just NE of Kurns Tower in FoB. Try hunting there. I've killed many, and never got these, so it may be ultra-rare or may not drop any longer.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 19 2001 at 1:08 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why are we asking about INT???? These say wis, if you want INT boots then do a search for them. <<sigh>>
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 14 2001 at 10:36 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The only thing close to this for Int boots is the Crystal Lined Slippers in Crystal Caverns. I got them at 30 in a grp of 6 all of us were 30-32 in lvl. Happy Hunts and good luck! =)

answer
QuoteReply
# Apr 15 2001 at 10:00 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The Burynai Cutter(a very rare burynai spawn) I have found and killed right around kurns tower in the field of bone. It was level 22 the only time I have ever seen it and it dropped a polished stone anklet. +2 dex and int, magic, 2.0 weight, all/all. So yes, there are +int boots you can get between levels 15-20.

Guru
145 posts
I ahve also hunted in Kurn's a lot...and have never see thses drop. However, I have managed to loot some Burynai Hide Sleeves from a scalebone and Reinforced Rhinohide boots from a lesser Icebone skeley. I'm guessing that the Burynai Hide is a rare drop from just about everything in the tower.

You just have to get lucky.

Shrikke - 20th Level Knight of Pain
Bristlebane
